rationale: The cited paper is a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than a generic mention: it centers on dual attitudes and implicit–explicit divergence (including resistance to later negative information), and the citing paper’s focal constructs and contribution also center on implicit vs. explicit attitude change and dual-process explanation in corrective messaging. With this strong conceptual overlap and a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.47.1.122), the pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
